title: xeriscent light saudi-arabian chicken drumsticks paella
description:
winey and tender chicken drumsticks cooked with saffron and served in a paella pan
this dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a special occasion
instructions: heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a paella pan over medium-high heat.
add the chicken drumsticks and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
add the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil to the pan.
add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
add the white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely evaporated, stirring occasionally.
add the chicken broth, saffron threads with their soaking liquid, and browned chicken drumsticks to the pan.
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
stir in the cooked rice and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
serve the paella hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
